title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Palantir, AMD, McDonald's, Broadcom, Airbnb & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls on several prominent companies including Nvidia, Apple, Palantir, and AMD on Monday, driving market attention across tech and consumer sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

zh.title: 周一最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、Palantir、AMD、麦当劳、博通、Airbnb等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周一对包括英伟达、苹果、Palantir和AMD在内的多家知名公司发布了重大评级，引发了科技和消费行业的市场关注。

title: Private student loan market set to expand under new federal loan caps — with risks for grad school borrowers
summary: New federal student loan caps taking effect in July will push more borrowers toward private lenders, raising consumer protection concerns among advocacy groups about graduate student borrowing.
content: After new federal student loan limits go into effect in July, more borrowers will turn to private lenders. Consumer advocates say that comes with risks.

zh.title: 新联邦学生贷款上限下私人学生贷款市场将扩张——对研究生借款人存在风险
zh.summary: 7月生效的新联邦学生贷款上限将推动更多借款人转向私人贷款机构，引发倡导组织对研究生借款消费者保护的担忧。

title: The markets are in the early stages of pricing in stagflation. Here’s what happens next.
summary: Citigroup's quantitative analysts say financial markets are beginning to price in stagflation—a combination of stagnant economic growth and persistent inflation—with significant implications ahead.
content: Citi’s team of quantitative analysts have studied the market and say, it’s beginning to smell like stagflation.

zh.title: 市场正处于滞胀定价的早期阶段。接下来会发生什么。
zh.summary: 花旗集团的量化分析师表示，金融市场开始对滞胀进行定价——这是经济停滞增长和持续通货膨胀的结合——将产生重大影响。

title: Oil prices climb after disputed report of Iran strike on U.S. warship
summary: Oil prices surged on reports of a disputed Iranian strike against a U.S. Navy vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, adding volatility to energy markets at the start of the trading week.
content: Oil is off to a volatile start to the week on a disputed report of a strike on a U.S. Navy ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 伊朗袭击美国军舰争议报告引发油价攀升
zh.summary: 伊朗对荷尔木兹海峡美国海军舰艇的争议性袭击报告导致油价飙升，在交易周初期增加了能源市场的波动性。

title: CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026: The league has its first $1 billion team
summary: CNBC's 2026 WNBA team valuations show the league's average franchise value reached $460 million, with one team now exceeding $1 billion in value—a milestone reflecting growing investment in women's professional basketball.
content: The average value of a Women's National Basketball Association team is $460 million, according to CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026.

zh.title: CNBC 2026年WNBA球队估值：联盟首支价值10亿美元的球队
zh.summary: CNBC的2026年WNBA球队估值报告显示，联盟平均特许经营权价值达4.6亿美元，其中一支球队估值超过10亿美元，标志着女子职业篮球投资的持续增长。

title: Meta's public nuisance case in New Mexico has billion-dollar consequences
summary: Meta faces a significant legal challenge in a New Mexico child safety case that could result in the company being declared a public nuisance, with potential billion-dollar financial consequences.
content: Meta is back in a Santa Fe courthouse in a child safety case that could determine whether the company is a public nuisance.

zh.title: Meta在新墨西哥州的公共妨害诉讼引发数十亿美元后果
zh.summary: Meta因新墨西哥州儿童安全案件面临重大法律挑战，可能被宣布为公共妨害，并承担数十亿美元的经济后果。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: eBay, Norwegian Cruise Line, Coinbase & more
summary: eBay, Norwegian Cruise Line, Coinbase, and other stocks are posting substantial premarket price movements, signaling notable early trading activity.
content: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 股市盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：eBay、挪威邮轮公司、Coinbase及其他
zh.summary: eBay、挪威邮轮公司、Coinbase和其他股票的盘前价格出现大幅波动，预示着显著的早盘交易活动。

title: Emerging markets, industrial stocks and utilities: Three investment strategies from the studio
summary: Investment strategists highlight emerging markets, industrial stocks, and utilities as three promising investment approaches amid current market conditions.

zh.title: 新兴市场、工业股和公用事业股：来自演播室的三种投资策略
zh.summary: 投资策略师强调新兴市场、工业股和公用事业股是在当前市场条件下三种有前景的投资方式。

title: Musk sought settlement with OpenAI before Oakland trial, filing shows
summary: Elon Musk attempted to settle with OpenAI before trial, seeking leadership changes and $150 billion in damages from both OpenAI and Microsoft.
content: Musk is seeking changes to OpenAI's leadership and $150 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, one of its largest investors.

zh.title: 文件显示马斯克在奥克兰审判前寻求与OpenAI和解
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克尝试在审判前与OpenAI达成和解，寻求领导层变动并向OpenAI和微软索赔1500亿美元。

title: Warsh's take on Fed independence is met with confusion and some concern
summary: Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh's interpretation of Fed independence is drawing skepticism from former Fed officials, raising concerns about his commitment to monetary policy autonomy.
content: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is putting his own spin on the independence of monetary policy. Many former Fed officials aren't sold.

zh.title: 沃什对美联储独立性的看法引发困惑和关注
zh.summary: 美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什对美联储独立性的解释引起了前美联储官员的怀疑，引发了对他对货币政策自主性承诺的担忧。

title: McDonald's likely to bounce as fast-food chain overhauls menus, marketing, UBS says
summary: UBS predicts McDonald's shares will rebound from an 11% three-month decline as the company's menu and marketing overhaul initiatives drive revenue growth.
content: McDonald's shares are down 11% over the past three months, but they should gain ground as the company's moves to increase sales begin to pay off, per UBS.

zh.title: 麦当劳可能反弹，美银美美林称快餐连锁店进行菜单和营销改革
zh.summary: 美银美美林预测麦当劳股价将从三个月下跌11%中反弹，因为公司的菜单和营销改革举措将推动收入增长。

title: 'Bubble effect': Weight loss drug fueled growth is putting the pharma sector at risk, report finds
summary: A Deloitte report warns the pharmaceutical industry faces risk from over-reliance on weight loss drugs, which now represent 25% of late-stage pipeline sales while oncology and other areas decline.
content: Obesity assets represent about 25% of total forecast sales of the late-stage pipeline, while oncology's share has slipped to 20%, Deloitte found.

zh.title: "泡沫效应"：减肥药驱动的增长正在给制药部门带来风险，报告发现
zh.summary: 德勤报告警告制药行业面临对减肥药过度依赖的风险，这些药物现在代表晚期管道销售的25%，而肿瘤学和其他领域在下降。

title: AI chipmaker Cerebras targets $3.5 billion raise in IPO
summary: AI chipmaker Cerebras is pursuing a $3.5 billion IPO that would value the company at up to $24.5 billion, up from its $23 billion February valuation.
content: The share sale could give the company a valuation of up to $24.5 billion, compared with $23 billion as of February.

zh.title: AI芯片制造商Cerebras目标在IPO中融资35亿美元
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras正在推进35亿美元的IPO，这将使该公司估值高达245亿美元，较其2月份230亿美元的估值有所上升。

title: ‘He is constantly criticizing her’: My son-in-law told my daughter to give up her job. Do I intervene?
summary: An advice columnist addresses a family dilemma where a son-in-law pressures his wife—a physical therapist earning $35,000-$40,000 annually—to leave her career.
content: “In 2025, she made $35,000-$40,000 working as a physical therapist.”

zh.title: "他不断批评她"：我的女婿要求女儿辞职。我应该干预吗？
zh.summary: 一位建议专栏作家探讨了一个家庭困境，其中女婿向他的妻子（一名年收入35,000至40,000美元的物理治疗师）施压，要求她放弃职业生涯。

title: Berkshire Hathaway is now sitting on a record $397 billion in cash. And it’s not the only firm reluctant to invest in the stock market.
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's record $397 billion cash position reflects broader investor reluctance to deploy capital in equities, signaling cautious sentiment across major financial institutions.
content: Berkshire Hathaway has added to a giant pile of cash, and sending a message for investors to be patient.

zh.title: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司现在坐拥创纪录的3970亿美元现金。它也不是唯一对股市投资持保留态度的公司。
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司创纪录的3970亿美元现金头寸反映了更广泛的投资者不愿在股票上部署资本，表明主要金融机构普遍持谨慎态度。

title: Trump says US to 'guide' stranded ships through Strait of Hormuz
summary: The US military is launching a major operation starting Monday to guide stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz, deploying over 100 aircraft and 15,000 personnel to ensure maritime passage during ongoing regional tensions.
content: More than 100 aircraft and 15,000 personnel will be part of the operation due to start on Monday, the US military says.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国将"引导"滞留的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 美军将从周一开始启动一项重大行动，引导滞留的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，部署超过100架飞机和15,000名人员，以确保在持续的地区紧张局势期间的海上通道。

title: India is burning more coal as extreme heat and the Iran war squeeze energy supplies
summary: India, the world's third-largest carbon emitter, is increasing coal consumption to meet surging electricity demand driven by extreme heat and regional energy constraints.
content: India, the world's third-largest emitter of carbon dioxide, is burning more coal as demand for power rises, most of which is coal-fired.

zh.title: 印度在极端高温和伊朗战争挤压能源供应之际增加煤炭燃烧
zh.summary: 作为全球第三大碳排放国的印度，正在增加煤炭消耗量，以满足由极端高温和地区能源限制驱动的电力需求激增。

title: European markets set to open lower as Trump threatens new auto tariffs
summary: European stock markets are expected to decline at the start of the trading week as Trump's threatened auto tariffs and Middle East developments create investor uncertainty.
content: European markets are expected to start the new trading week in negative territory, as investors watched Middle East developments.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁新汽车关税，欧洲市场预期低开
zh.summary: 随着特朗普威胁的汽车关税和中东局势发展造成投资者不确定性，欧洲股市预计在交易周开始时下跌。

title: World Cup prize pool nears $900 million as FIFA boosts payouts. Here’s who gets what
summary: FIFA has set a record-breaking prize pool of nearly $900 million for the upcoming World Cup, significantly increasing payouts to participating nations and players.
content: FIFA's upcoming World Cup is set to be the most lucrative on-record, with a 'record breaking' prize pool on offer, as FIFA shrugs off other controversies.

zh.title: 世界杯奖金池接近9亿美元，国际足联提高了赔付。这是获得者名单
zh.summary: 国际足联为即将举行的世界杯设立了创纪录的近9亿美元奖金池，大幅增加了对参赛国家和球员的赔付。

title: 'I had to pay £14k after my cat was run over'
summary: Pet owners face substantial medical bills when their animals are injured or sick, with insurance coverage gaps leaving many vulnerable to unexpected costs.
content: People with and without pet insurance are facing large bills when their animals get sick or injured.

zh.title: "我的猫被碾过后不得不支付1.4万英镑"
zh.summary: 当宠物受伤或生病时，宠物主人面临巨额医疗账单，保险覆盖范围缺口使许多人容易遭受意外费用。

title: Meme stock GameStop makes $56 billion offer for eBay in bid to rival Amazon
summary: GameStop has made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a combined cash-and-stock deal valued at approximately $55.5 billion, signaling ambitions to compete with Amazon.
content: GameStop made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a cash-and-stock deal that values the e-commerce platform at roughly $55.5 billion.

zh.title: 梗股GameStop出价560亿美元收购eBay，意欲与亚马逊竞争
zh.summary: GameStop已向eBay提出收购要约，以每股125美元的现金和股票混合交易方式出价，交易价值约555亿美元，表明其与亚马逊竞争的野心。

title: What an empty car park tells us about the UK's debt problem
summary: The BBC explores the UK's debt crisis through the lens of communities in England's poorest regions, examining economic challenges facing struggling areas.
content: The BBC has been speaking to people living in one of England's poorest communities.

zh.title: 空停车场向我们讲述英国债务问题
zh.summary: 英国广播公司通过英格兰最贫困地区社区的视角探讨了英国债务危机，并审视了这些困难地区面临的经济挑战。

title: The nuclear option: Atomic energy could offer Europe hope, say analysts — but it won't be easy
summary: Nuclear energy could help address Europe's energy security concerns, particularly following disruptions to vital shipping routes, though implementation faces significant technical and regulatory challenges.
content: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping route, has exposed which nations are most exposed to disrupted energy imports.

zh.title: 核能选项：分析师称原子能能为欧洲带来希望——但实现并非易事
zh.summary: 核能可能有助于解决欧洲的能源安全问题，特别是在重要航运路线中断之后，尽管实施面临重大的技术和监管挑战。

title: Denmark faces data center reckoning as power grid overwhelmed by surging demand
summary: Denmark's power grid is struggling to handle explosive growth in data center demand, prompting governments worldwide to consider imposing limits on these power-intensive facilities.
content: The data center industry is facing a reckoning as governments around the world consider imposing limits on the growth of the power-hungry facilities.

zh.title: 丹麦面临数据中心清算，电网不堪激增电力需求
zh.summary: 丹麦电网难以应对数据中心需求的爆炸性增长，这促使世界各地政府考虑对这些耗能设施施加限制。

title: Samsung family pays off record $8bn inheritance tax bill
summary: Samsung's founding family has settled a record $8 billion inheritance tax bill related to the estate of late chairman Lee Kun-hee, who passed away in October 2020.
content: The bill is tied to the estate left by the firm's late chairman Lee Kun-hee, who died in  October 2020.

zh.title: 三星家族偿付创纪录的80亿美元遗产税账单
zh.summary: 三星创始人家族已结清与已故董事长李健熙遗产相关的创纪录80亿美元遗产税账单，李健熙于2020年10月逝世。

title: GameStop is hungry for relevance. Is buying eBay the answer?
summary: GameStop's bid to acquire eBay represents an attempt to regain market relevance by acquiring an e-commerce platform that has adapted better to changing consumer preferences.
content: GameStop has offered to buy eBay, which has done a better job of adapting to changing consumer preferences.

zh.title: GameStop渴望重振雄风，收购eBay是答案吗？
zh.summary: GameStop收购eBay的举措代表了通过收购一个更好适应消费者偏好变化的电商平台来重新获得市场关联度的尝试。

title: Rudy Giuliani, former New York mayor and Trump lawyer, hospitalized in critical condition
summary: Rudy Giuliani, former New York mayor and Trump's legal adviser, has been hospitalized in critical condition; Trump praised his contributions in a recent statement.
content: President Donald Trump called Rudy Giuliani a "True Warrior, and the Best Mayor in the History of New York City, BY FAR," in a Truth Social post.

zh.title: 前纽约市长兼特朗普律师朱利安尼因重病住院
zh.summary: 前纽约市长兼特朗普法律顾问朱利安尼因病情危重被住院治疗，特朗普近日发声称赞了他的贡献。

title: Oil prices rise in choppy trade as Trump plans to 'free' ships stranded due to Mideast conflict
summary: A tanker was hit by projectiles near Fujairah in the UAE, contributing to volatile oil trading amid regional tensions. Trump's announcement to "free" stranded ships could impact energy market stability. The incident underscores ongoing disruptions to global oil supplies.
content: The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations agency said Monday that a tanker was hit by projectiles north of the city of of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates.

zh.title: 油价波动上升，特朗普计划"解救"因中东冲突搁浅的船只
zh.summary: 一艘油轮在阿联酋富吉拉附近遭到炮击，加剧了地区紧张局势下油价波动。特朗普宣布"解救"搁浅船只可能影响能源市场稳定。该事件突显了对全球油气供应的持续破坏。

title: GameStop offers to buy eBay for $56bn
summary: GameStop has proposed acquiring eBay for $56 billion, with CEO Ryan Cohen expressing confidence in transforming it into a stronger Amazon competitor. The deal signals GameStop's expansion beyond gaming retail into broader e-commerce. The acquisition would represent major consolidation in the online marketplace sector.
content: GameStop's chief executive Ryan Cohen told the Wall Street Journal that he sees potential to make eBay a much bigger rival to Amazon.

zh.title: GameStop提议以560亿美元收购eBay
zh.summary: GameStop提议以560亿美元收购eBay，首席执行官瑞恩·科亨表示有信心将其转变为更强有力的亚马逊竞争对手。该交易表明GameStop正在从游戏零售扩展到更广泛的电子商务领域。这项收购将代表在线市场部门的重大整合。

title: Investors appear skeptical as Trump touts new plan to partially reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Trump announced plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but investors remained skeptical about feasibility and implementation. Shipping has been stranded in the Persian Gulf due to the Iran conflict, disrupting global trade flows. Market hesitation reflects doubts about the proposal's effectiveness.
content: Investors appeared skeptical Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. will work to “free” neutral shipping that’s been stranded in the Persian Gulf since the start of the war with Iran.

zh.title: 投资者表示怀疑，特朗普推介部分重开霍尔木兹海峡新计划
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布了重开霍尔木兹海峡的计划，但投资者对其可行性和实施情况持怀疑态度。由于伊朗冲突，船只在波斯湾搁浅，中断全球贸易流动。市场的犹豫反映了人们对该提议有效性的怀疑。

title: South Korean stocks hit fresh record, building on historic monthly rally in April
summary: South Korean stocks reached fresh record highs, extending a strong rally from April. Asian markets opened mixed as investors assessed Trump's Strait of Hormuz initiative and its economic implications. The performance reflects positive sentiment in the region despite broader uncertainties.
content: Asia markets were set to open mixed Monday as investors assess news of President Donald Trump's plan to "free" ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 韩国股市创新高，4月创历史性涨幅纪录
zh.summary: 韩国股市创历史新高，延续4月的强劲涨势。亚洲市场开盘涨跌不一，投资者评估特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡倡议及其经济影响。尽管存在更广泛的不确定性，该地区的表现反映了积极情绪。
